title: Les vêtements et les couleurs — Clothes & colours
objective: Describe clothes and colours with correct adjective agreement (A1: can describe everyday objects and clothing with simple adjectives).

bridge.title: Bridge from Hindi / English: colours change to match the noun
bridge.body: In French, a colour used as an adjective agrees with its noun: **un pull vert** (masc.), **une robe verte** (fem.), **des robes vertes** (plural). The endings **-e** and **-s** are added just like Hindi adjectives shift — think **अच्छा** → **अच्छी** when the noun turns feminine. Handy analogy, not an exact rule: some French colours never change (**rouge**, **jaune**, **orange**), and Hindi **लाल** never changes either. English adjectives never change at all (“a green dress”, “green dresses”). Also learn **ce pull**, **cette robe**, **ces chaussures** = “this / these”.

quiz.prompt: What is the main bridge idea for "Les vêtements et les couleurs — Clothes & colours"?
options: Focus on: colours agree in gender and number with the noun

example.french: Arjun porte un pull vert au marché.
example.englishGloss: Arjun is wearing a green sweater at the market.

glosses.hi: अर्जुन बाज़ार में हरा स्वेटर पहनता है।
glosses.en: Arjun is wearing a green sweater at the market.
glosses.gu: અર્જુન બજારમાં લીલો સ્વેટર પહેરે છે.
glosses.pa: ਅਰਜੁਨ ਬਾਜ਼ਾਰ ਵਿੱਚ ਹਰਾ ਸਵੈਟਰ ਪਹਿਨਦਾ ਹੈ।

glosses.hi: प्रिया को सफ़ेद कमीज़ पसंद है।
glosses.pa: ਪ੍ਰਿਯਾ ਨੂੰ ਚਿੱਟੀ ਕਮੀਜ਼ ਪਸੰਦ ਹੈ।

example.french: Il y a un pantalon noir dans le magasin.
example.englishGloss: There is a black pair of trousers in the shop.

glosses.hi: दुकान में एक काली पैंट है।
glosses.en: There is a black pair of trousers in the shop.
glosses.pa: ਦੁਕਾਨ ਵਿੱਚ ਇੱਕ ਕਾਲੀ ਪੈਂਟ ਹੈ।

example.french: Pour le mariage, Ananya porte une robe rouge.
example.englishGloss: For the wedding, Ananya is wearing a red dress.

glosses.hi: शादी के लिए अनन्या लाल फ़्रॉक पहनती है।
glosses.en: For the wedding, Ananya is wearing a red dress.
glosses.gu: લગ્ન માટે અનન્યા લાલ ડ્રેસ પહેરે છે.
glosses.pa: ਵਿਆਹ ਲਈ ਅਨਨਿਆ ਲਾਲ ਡਰੈੱਸ ਪਹਿਨਦੀ ਹੈ।

example.french: Priya aime les chaussures bleues du bazar.
example.englishGloss: Priya likes the blue shoes from the bazaar.

glosses.hi: प्रिया को बाज़ार के नीले जूते पसंद हैं।
glosses.en: Priya likes the blue shoes from the bazaar.
glosses.gu: પ્રિયાને બજારના વાદળી બૂટ ગમે છે.
glosses.pa: ਪ੍ਰਿਯਾ ਨੂੰ ਬਾਜ਼ਾਰ ਦੀਆਂ ਨੀਲੀਆਂ ਜੁੱਤੀਆਂ ਪਸੰਦ ਹਨ।

example.french: À Holi, le rouge est partout.

glosses.hi: होली में लाल रंग हर जगह होता है।
glosses.gu: હોળીમાં લાલ રંગ બધે હોય છે.
glosses.pa: ਹੋਲੀ ਵਿੱਚ ਲਾਲ ਰੰਗ ਹਰ ਥਾਂ ਹੁੰਦਾ ਹੈ।

example.french: Un pull vert, une robe verte.
example.englishGloss: A green sweater, a green dress.

glosses.hi: एक हरा स्वेटर, एक हरी फ़्रॉक।
glosses.en: A green sweater, a green dress.
glosses.mr: एक हिरवा स्वेटर, एक हिरवी ड्रेस.
glosses.gu: એક લીલો સ્વેટર, એક લીલી ડ્રેસ.
glosses.pa: ਇੱਕ ਹਰਾ ਸਵੈਟਰ, ਇੱਕ ਹਰੀ ਡਰੈੱਸ।
glosses.ta: ஒரு பச்சை ஸ்வெட்டர், ஒரு பச்சை உடை.
glosses.te: ఒక ఆకుపచ్చ స్వెటర్, ఒక ఆకుపచ్చ గౌను.
glosses.kn: ಒಂದು ಹಸಿರು ಸ್ವೆಟರ್, ಒಂದು ಹಸಿರು ಉಡುಗೆ.

example.french: Ananya porte un lehenga jaune au mariage.
example.englishGloss: Ananya wears a yellow lehenga at the wedding.

glosses.hi: अनन्या शादी में पीला लहंगा पहनती है।
glosses.en: Ananya wears a yellow lehenga at the wedding.
glosses.gu: અનન્યા લગ્નમાં પીળો લેહંગા પહેરે છે.
glosses.pa: ਅਨਨਿਆ ਵਿਆਹ ਵਿੱਚ ਪੀਲਾ ਲਹਿੰਗਾ ਪਹਿਨਦੀ ਹੈ।

exercises.hint: The noun « robe » is feminine, so add -e to the colour.
exercises.coachNote: Describe clothes and colours with correct adjective agreement (A1: can describe everyday objects and clothing with simple adjectives).

exercises.hint: « chaussures » is feminine plural, so the colour takes -es.
exercises.coachNote: Describe clothes and colours with correct adjective agreement (A1: can describe everyday objects and clothing with simple adjectives).

exercises.hint: « pull » is masculine — the colour stays in its base form.
exercises.coachNote: Describe clothes and colours with correct adjective agreement (A1: can describe everyday objects and clothing with simple adjectives).
exercises.prompt: Arjun wears a green sweater. Which is correct?
exercises.explanation: « pull » is masculine singular, so the colour stays « vert » with no ending.

exercises.hint: Which demonstrative goes with a feminine noun?
exercises.coachNote: Describe clothes and colours with correct adjective agreement (A1: can describe everyday objects and clothing with simple adjectives).
exercises.prompt: How do you say “this dress” (une robe)?
exercises.explanation: « robe » is feminine, so use « cette ». « ce » is masculine and « ces » is plural.

exercises.hint: Colour follows the noun and agrees: robe (fem.) → rouge stays the same.
exercises.coachNote: Describe clothes and colours with correct adjective agreement (A1: can describe everyday objects and clothing with simple adjectives).
